item.occultism_ritualmaster.ritual_dummy: The Ritualmaster automates ritual execution. Provide it with a §lSurprisingly Substantial Satchel§r containing the corresponding ritual Sealed Pentacle, and it will gather nearby suitable materials to perform the ritual on its own.
item.occultism_ritualmaster.sealed_penta: Right-Click a Golden Ritual Bowl to seal a formed pentacle within it.
ritual.occultism_ritualmaster.summon_rit: Not all requirements for this ritual are met.
Interruption in the ritual: Summon Ritualmaster.
